title: Step 97: Differential Response readout

content.purpose: Test collective codebook surprise (differential displacement) as a readout signal. Candidate 1 in the readout search arc.
content.method: Measure attention-weighted displacement of codebook vectors as readout for classification.
content.result: KILLED. Differential readout 15.0% vs 1-NN 22.7%. Codebook starved to 1-8 vectors. Attention and displacement anti-correlate: high-attention vectors are already aligned, producing small displacements. The signal is in the product, which reduces to cosine similarity.
content.key_insight: Anti-correlation between attention and displacement means the differential signal carries no information beyond what cosine similarity already provides.

constraints_implied: fc011: Readout signal factors must not anti-correlate
